initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.GOT > 40 THEN p.ID END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS percentage_abnormal_got_with_sle
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.GOT IS NOT NULL THEN p.ID END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.GOT IS NOT NULL THEN p.ID END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.GOT IS NOT NULL THEN p.ID END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS percentage_abnormal_got_with_sle
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.GOT IS NOT NULL THEN p.ID END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS percentage_abnormal_got_with_sle
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';
